message:
feat(abi): delegate fstab/ttyent to host libc, add fill_rpcent_result for reentrant RPC, refactor mutex/condvar init

pthread_abi.rs:
- Flatten nested if-let guards in pthread_mutex_init and pthread_cond_init
  into idiomatic `if cond && let Some(...)` patterns, preserving identical
  semantics for host-delegation vs native fallback.

unistd_abi.rs:
- Add repr(C) structs: Fstab, RpcEnt, TtyEnt for host interop.
- Add host extern declarations for setfsent, endfsent, getfsent,
  getfsfile, getfsspec, setttyent, getttyent, getttynam, endttyent.
- Replace no-op stubs for fstab functions (setfsent, getfsent, getfsfile,
  getfsspec, endfsent) with ELF-resolver host delegation via
  resolve_host_symbol_raw, avoiding LD_PRELOAD recursion.
- Replace no-op stubs for ttyent functions (setttyent, getttyent,
  getttynam, endttyent) with host delegation, setting errno on failure.
- Add fill_rpcent_result() helper that deep-copies RpcEnt fields
  (r_name, r_aliases, r_number) into a caller-supplied buffer with
  proper ERANGE handling.
- Rewrite getrpcbyname_r, getrpcbynumber_r, getrpcent_r to use
  fill_rpcent_result instead of returning raw static pointers, fixing
  reentrant safety.

unistd_abi_test.rs:
- Add Fstab, RpcEnt, TtyEnt repr(C) structs and extern declarations
  for reentrant RPC and ttyent functions.
- Add fstab_wrappers_surface_host_entries test: validates setfsent,
  getfsent, getfsfile, getfsspec round-trip.
- Add ttyent_wrappers_match_host_miss_shape test: validates getttynam
  miss returns NULL, setttyent sets errno on /etc/ttys absence,
  endttyent returns success.
- Add rpc_reentrant_wrappers_match_host_shapes test: validates
  getrpcbyname_r, getrpcbynumber_r, getrpcent_r with buffer filling,
  NULL result on miss, and iteration via setrpcent.
- Update import list for new public symbols.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
